violations.text: Refrigerator door gasket on two door freezer were observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good condition. New Violation. Correct By: 02/23/2024

Wood is used in the construction of the hot hold unit in the kitchen. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. Correct by date 2/23/24. Wood is used in the construction of the hand sink in the downstairs bar area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2024
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 01/25/2024
